name: 共价键（VSEPR/极性/杂化）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 2 · 化学键与结构 Structure 2 · The Molecular World
curriculum_points: Describe the formation of a covalent bond by the sharing of a pair of electrons between atoms, and represent it using Lewis (electron dot) structures for molecules and ions containing up to six electron pairs on each atom (AO2).

Explain the shapes of, and bond angles in, simple molecules and ions with up to six electron pairs (including lone pairs) on the central atom using the valence shell electron pair repulsion (VSEPR) theory (AO2, AO3).
